_generated: by tools/gen-templates.mjs from templates/ — do not edit

templates.title: DWC Browser Program
templates.description: A minimal BBj program that opens a window with a button and runs in the browser via DWC.
templates.body:
REM ${ProgramName}
REM Generated from the BBj starter catalogue.
REM Run with "Run As DWC Program" (Alt+D).

REM --- Open the SysGui channel --------------------------------------------
sysgui! = BBjAPI().openSysGui("X0")

REM --- Create the top-level window -----------------------------------------
title$ = "${WindowTitle}"
window! = sysgui!.addWindow(50, 50, 400, 220, title$)
window!.setCallback(BBjAPI.ON_CLOSE, "onClose")

REM --- Add a button ---------------------------------------------------------
button! = window!.addButton(101, 140, 90, 120, 40, "Say hello")
button!.setCallback(BBjAPI.ON_BUTTON_PUSH, "onButtonPush")

REM --- Hand control to the event loop ---------------------------------------
process_events

onButtonPush:
    msg$ = "Hello from " + title$ + "!"
    msgbox(msg$, 0, title$)
return

onClose:
    release
return
